channel.title: About on Herbert Sizek
channel.description: Recent content in About on Herbert Sizek

item.title: About Me
item.description:
HIIII

Goodday. You have stumbled upon the website of Herbert.

I do things.

Research Realm:

I do some different pieces of research. Two questions I think about regularly are:

  • How do we improve data quality and data aggregation in Agricultural settings?
  • How do we model discrete actions and behaviors discretely?

Mostly, I think about this in terms of agricultrual data, but will venture to other places if inspired.

Teaching Realm:

I’ve tought various courses in the past including:

item.title: Contact Me
item.description:
Contact me!

The easist way to contact me is through email: [lastname].[firstname]@gmail.com

Or in person, I’m fairly easy to find, you just have to find the person lugging around a hammered dulcimer around town. There’s like two of us. But that also requires that you are in town. :-)
